title: how many total female candidates are there?

messages.text: how many total female candidates are there?

messages.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_female_candidates
FROM candidates
WHERE gender = 'Female'
LIMIT 200;

messages.text: how many total female candidates are there? and list them
